message:
Fix string method memory leaks

Extended defer cleanup to cover all allocating string methods:
- Detection: Type-aware method call detection in assign.zig
- Coverage: 13 methods (upper, lower, strip, replace, join, etc.)
- Inline calls: Wrap in block with temp vars + defer in misc.zig

Changes:
- assign.zig: Extended is_allocated_string to detect 13 string methods
- misc.zig: Added isAllocatingMethodCall, wrap print inline methods

Before: String methods leaked memory
After: Zero leaks for method assignments and inline calls

Test results: Still 30 passing (fixes prevent leaks, no new test passes yet)
